<answer>In 2013, the following entities expressed intent to cooperate with China:

1. South Africa (March 26, 27, 28 and April 1, 2013)
2. Japan (February 21, May 4, 6, June 24, October 28, 29, 2013)
3. Malaysia (October 4, November 1, 2013)
4. Thailand (May 3, October 12, 16, 2013)
5. France (May 7, September 25, 26, 2013)
6. South Korea (June 4, 27, 2013)
7. Vietnam (September 3, 4, October 14, 2013)
8. Yemen (September 23, 2013)

Additionally, Malaysia expressed intent to cooperate economically with China on July 26, 2013, and Thailand cooperated economically with China on October 14, 2013.</answer>
